title: EU Converter
description: Converts IC2C EU power to FE
body:
This mod adds EU Converters for LV, MV and HV

The converter takes in Forge Energy from the input side, and outputs EU to adjacent IC2C machines, transformers and battery boxes.

Conversion rate is configurable, default is 4FE per EU


[![Sponsor Time](https://jonn.dk/akliz_banner_productivebees.png)](https://www.akliz.net/lobstermods)
